ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is assigned to */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the player is part of */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season the player is active in */,
  "replaced" INTEGER /* Indicator if the player was replaced in the roster */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Player's height */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Player's weight */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Player's jersey number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_league FOREIGN KEY ("league") REFERENCES leagues ("league_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team is part of */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Team's stadium name */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Team's stadium capacity */,
  "team_owner" TEXT /* Team's owner */,
  "general_manager" TEXT /* Team's general manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league operates */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code of the league */,
  "league_level" TEXT /* Level of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "season_type" TEXT /* Type of season */,
  "playoff_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points scored */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Total steals */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Total blocks */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers made */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of three-pointers attempted */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Number of free throws made */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of free throws attempted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the player in the team */,
  "roster_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the team */,
  "roster_status" TEXT /* Player's roster status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the player recovered */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_schedules_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_schedules_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_schedules_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Rebounds in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks in the game */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played in the game */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Personal fouls committed in the game */,
  "technical_fouls" INTEGER /* Technical fouls committed in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the game was played */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance of the game */,
  "game_notes" TEXT /* Additional game notes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the user has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
column_names: Reference to the team the player is assigned to
League the player is part of
Season the player is active in
Indicator if the player was replaced in the roster

Unique identifier for each statistic entry
Unique identifier for each roster entry
